## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff, pyright --strict, pytest)
- [ ] Schema change? An Alembic migration is included
- [ ] Significant decision? An ADR is added under `docs/adr/`
- [ ] No secrets added to code, logs, or fixtures
- [ ] Docs/README/CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed
